name: github_generate_runner_jitconfig_for_repo
description: Generate a just-in-time runner configuration for a repository (POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/runners/generate-jitconfig). Provide runner_name, runner_group_id, labels (1-100), optional work_folder (default _work). Classic tokens need repo scope. Success is HTTP 201 with runner and encoded_jit_config. See GitHub REST self-hosted runners.
